at.description: When was last updated, the field follows the ISO 8601 format (HH:mm:ss.ssssssZ)

billable.description: Whether the time entry is marked as billable

client_id.description: Related entities meta fields - if requested

description.description: Time Entry description, null if not provided at creation/update

duration.description: Time entry duration. For running entries should be negative, preferable -1

duronly.description: Used to create a TE with a duration but without a stop time, this field is deprecated for GET endpoints where the value will always be true.

project_id.description: Project ID. Can be null if project was not provided or project was later deleted

shared_with.description: Indicates who the time entry has been shared with

stop.description: Stop time in UTC, can be null if it's still running or created with "duration" and "duronly" fields

organization_id.description:
ID of the organization for which the quota is reported. If null, represents the quota for requests
that do not belong to any organization, such as the /me endpoints.

remaining.description:
Number of API calls remaining for the current window. Once this value reaches zero, no further
requests will be accepted until the window resets. While the quota is not enforced, this value may
go negative, indicating how much the user has exceeded the limit.

resets_in_secs.description:
Time until the window resets, in seconds. Once this value reaches zero, the window is reset and
more requests will be accepted again.

total.description: Total number of API calls allowed for the current window. This value depends on the organization's plan.

temporary flag which is true iff there is at least one admin in the organization,
who has the `multi_workspace_payments` beta flag enabled

KeepTrialOnSubscription instructs a consumer that when user chooses to subscribe,
the trial should be kept. Unless it's `true`, customer must cancel the trial.
If no trial active, is nil

temporary flag which is true iff there is at least one admin in the organization,
who has the `multi_workspace_payments` beta flag enabled

keep_trial_on_subscription.description:
KeepTrialOnSubscription instructs a consumer that when user chooses to subscribe,
the trial should be kept. Unless it's `true`, customer must cancel the trial.
If no trial active, is nil

at.description: When was last updated, the field follows the ISO 8601 format (HH:mm:ss.ssssssZ)

billable.description: Whether the time entry is marked as billable

client_id.description: Related entities meta fields - if requested

description.description: Time Entry description, null if not provided at creation/update

duration.description: Time entry duration. For running entries should be negative, preferable -1

duronly.description: Used to create a TE with a duration but without a stop time, this field is deprecated for GET endpoints where the value will always be true.

project_id.description: Project ID. Can be null if project was not provided or project was later deleted

shared_with.description: Indicates who the time entry has been shared with

stop.description: Stop time in UTC, can be null if it's still running or created with "duration" and "duronly" fields

tag_ids.description: Tag IDs, null if tags were not provided or were later deleted

tags.description: Tag names, null if tags were not provided or were later deleted

task_id.description: Task ID. Can be null if task was not provided or project was later deleted

uid.description: Time Entry creator ID, legacy field

id.description: The ID for which the patch operation failed.

success.description: The IDs for which the patch was succesful.

event_filters.description: List of filters to select events to notifiy

action.description: Type of modification applied to the business entity

entity.description: Toggl Track business entity to which this filter applies

has_pending_events.description: Whether there are events pending to be delivered to this subscription

secret.description: Allows to validate whether the received events have been sent by Toggl

url_callback.description: URL endpoint where events will be notified

validated_at.description: Time for when this subscription has been validated
